source_pr.title: planner/core: fix bug that injected proj get wrong index.
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
Problem Summary:
Injected proj below union don't resolve index.
### What is changed and how it works?
resolve it
### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test


### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- planner/core: fix bug that injected proj get wrong index.

symptoms: tk.MustQuery("(select * from x1 union all select * from x4) order by a, b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2", "2 2", "2 3", "3 3", "4 4", )) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery("(select * from x1 union all select * from x4) order by a, b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2", "2 2", "2 3", "3 3", "4 4", )) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
fix_pattern: tk.MustQuery("(select * from x1 union all select * from x4) order by a, b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2", "2 2", "2 3", "3 3", "4 4", )) (executor/tiflash_test.go)

evidence: evidence: tk.MustQuery("(select * from x1 union all select * from x4) order by a, b").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1", "2 2", "2 2", "2 3", "3 3", "4 4", )) (executor/tiflash_test.go)
